author: Nintendo of America YouTube
text:
Monopoly: Star Wars Heroes vs. Villains – Launch Trailer – Nintendo Switch 2
Play Monopoly: Star Wars Heroes vs. Villains now on Nintendo Switch 2 and Nintendo Switch: https://www.nintendo.com/us/store/products/monopoly-star-wars-heroes-vs-villains-switch-2/?utm_source=SW&utm_medium=soytnoa&utm_campaign=P1057-01&utm_id=P1057-01 

Monopoly evolves with a bold Star Wars twist! Experience team-based play, character abilities, and dynamic board moments that can change the game with every roll.  

#Monopoly #StarWarsvsVillains 

Visit Nintendo.com for more info: https://ninten.do/6008Spp2s

author: Nintendo of America YouTube
text:
Nintendo Treehouse: Live | Splatoon Raiders
Join us after the Splatoon Raiders Direct 6.30.2026 to watch Nintendo Treehouse: Live for additional Splatoon Raiders gameplay. The livestream will last approximately 30 minutes.

Splatoon Raiders releases exclusively for Nintendo Switch 2 on July 23, 2026. Pre-order today: https://www.nintendo.com/us/store/products/splatoon-raiders-switch-2/?utm_source=SW-AA&utm_medium=soytnoa&utm_campaign=S1028-01&utm_id=S1028-01

author: Nintendo of America YouTube
text:
Splatoon Raiders Direct 6.30.2026
Join us on June 30 at 7am PT for the Splatoon Raiders Direct! The presentation will last roughly 15 minutes and provide more info on the upcoming Nintendo Switch 2 game.

Watch Nintendo Treehouse: Live for additional Splatoon Raiders gameplay.
➤ https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GK93aZDpePk

Splatoon Raiders releases exclusively for Nintendo Switch 2 on July 23, 2026. Pre-order today: https://www.nintendo.com/us/store/products/splatoon-raiders-switch-2/?utm_source=SW-AA&utm_medium=soytnoa&utm_campaign=S1028-01&utm_id=S1028-01
